# ferriskey_role (Data Source)

Looks up an existing realm role by name. Useful to reference built-in admin roles (e.g. `staff`, `master-realm`) when granting a service account its permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ferriskey_role" "staff" {
  realm = "master"
  name  = "staff"
}

output "staff_role_id" {
  value = data.ferriskey_role.staff.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the role to look up.
- `realm` (String) Realm the role belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Role description.
- `id` (String) UUID of the role.
- `permissions` (Set of String) Permissions granted by the role.
